prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名2021年第67名→2022年第65名→2023年第66 名→2024年第60名→2025年第67名→2026年第73名，近年排名略有下滑但仍稳居全国前80，属于中上游211；该校在2021–2026年声誉文件中未出现明显负面舆情或 投档异常记录，学校声誉平稳；抖音热度未进入前100名，曝光度一般，报考关注度相对平稳；第五轮学科评估数据中未收录中国石油大学（华东），但该校以 石油石化特色见长，石油与天然气工程、地质资源与地质工程等为传统优势学科，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 本省2026年高考总人数约120万（较202 5年约90.7万大幅增加约32%），物理类考生估算约73.4万，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；该校位于山东青岛，属东部沿海城市，对河南考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在河南招生规模较大（物理类2025年304人、2026年357人），是该校在省外的重要生源地。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were 29573 → 30098 → 23710 → 28637 → 33569, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend. In the past two years, it significantly dropped from 23710 to 33569, a cumulative decline of about 9860 places. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 33569. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 272 in 2021, 282 in 2022, 294 in 2023, 294 in 2024, and 304 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 357, an increase of 53 from 2025 (expansion of about 17.4%), which is a relatively large expansion and will have a pushing-back effect on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it ranked 67th in 2021 → 65th in 2022 → 66th in 2023 → 60th in 2024 → 67th in 2025 → 73rd in 2026. In recent years, the ranking has slightly declined but remains stable among the top 80 nationally, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. In the reputation documents from 2021 to 2026, there were no obvious negative public opinions or abnormal filing records, and the university's reputation is stable. Its Douyin popularity did not enter the top 100, with average exposure and relatively stable application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation data, China University of Petroleum (East China) was not included, but the university is known for its petroleum and petrochemical characteristics, with petroleum and natural gas engineering, geological resources and geological engineering as traditional advantageous disciplines, which have some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of provincial college entrance exam takers is about 1.2 million (a significant increase of about 32% from approximately 907,000 in 2025), with an estimated 734,000 Physics Category examinees. The candidate scale has significantly expanded, intensifying competition. The university is located in Qingdao, Shandong, an eastern coastal city, which has some regional appeal for Henan candidates. The university has a large enrollment scale in Henan (304 in Physics Category in 2025, 357 in 2026), making it an important source of students outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 33569, the significant expansion of 17.4% in 2026 (pushing back rankings by about 3511 places), and the substantial increase of about 32% in the total number of provincial examinees (intensifying competition), along with the further intensification of competition due to the surge in candidate numbers, the predicted minimum ranking is slightly adjusted upward to about 37130, with a range of 36630–37630.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 36630–37630, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 popular majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 36000), you can focus on aiming for popular Tier 1 majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., outside 37500), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 safety majors and carefully select Tier 2.
